feed.title: 智域前沿 · 全球科技与安全态势日报
feed.subtitle: 本期从 6 个公开信源筛选出 10 条重点事件，覆盖科技、AI、航空航天、安全动态与无人系统。

entry.title: Lockheed rolls out cheaper Patriot, MBDA showcases low-cost interceptor
entry.summary: Displayed in a truck mounted configuration at the show, the new MBDA weapon is an upgrade to the company’s ground-launched, Advanced Short Range Air-to-Air Missile (ASRAAM) and ca… 关键事实：Displayed in a truck mounted configuration at the show, the new MBDA weapon is an upgrade to the company’s ground-launched, Advanced Short Range Air-to-Air Missile (ASRAAM) and ca…

entry.title: Pentagon identifies American soldiers killed in Iranian attack in Jordan
entry.summary: 1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan, 25, and Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, 19, were killed in action in an Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack in Jordan. 关键事实：1st Lt. Tyler James Feehan, 25, and Pvt. Isabella Gonzales, 19, were killed in action in an Iranian ballistic missile and drone attack in Jordan.

entry.title: New VC-25B Air Force One Will Be Pulled From Service To Be “Maxed Out” With Upgrades
entry.summary: Trump said the ex-Qatari 747 is going to be upgraded soon when asked about the lack of defensive countermeasures on the new jet. 关键事实：Trump said the ex-Qatari 747 is going to be upgraded soon when asked about the lack of defensive countermeasures on the new jet.

entry.title: Thunderstruck: Anduril unveils autonomous attack rotorcraft
entry.summary: Anduril's autonomous attack rotorcraft, dubbed Thunder, is designed to operate with current and next-generation crewed attack helicopter platforms. 关键事实：Anduril's autonomous attack rotorcraft, dubbed Thunder, is designed to operate with current and next-generation crewed attack helicopter platforms.

entry.title: Anduril Brings The Thunder With Autonomous Tiltrotor Attack Drone Concept
entry.summary: Thunder is designed to fly deep into hostile airspace at low altitude as a highly autonomous wingman for AH-64 Apaches and MV-75 Cheyennes. 关键事实：Thunder is designed to fly deep into hostile airspace at low altitude as a highly autonomous wingman for AH-64 Apaches and MV-75 Cheyennes.

entry.title: From Hampton to Mars: How NASA Langley Helped Land on the Red Planet
entry.summary: Fifty years ago, NASA’s Viking 1 and 2 landers made the first successful landings on Mars, opening a new era in planetary exploration. Behind that achievement was a team at NASA’s… 关键事实：Fifty years ago, NASA’s Viking 1 and 2 landers made the first successful landings on Mars, opening a new era in planetary exploration. Behind that achievement was a team at NASA’s…

entry.title: Our First View of the Surface of Mars
entry.summary: “Touchdown, we have touchdown!” At 5:12 a.m. PDT, July 20, 1976, mission controllers at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory erupted in cheers as they learned that the Viking 1 lander… 关键事实：“Touchdown, we have touchdown!” At 5:12 a.m. PDT, July 20, 1976, mission controllers at NASA’s Jet Propulsion Laboratory erupted in cheers as they learned that the Viking 1 lander…

entry.title: Anduril reveals Thunder, a ‘loyal wingman’ drone for helicopters
entry.summary: The company describes Thunder as a fully autonomous armed reconnaissance tiltrotor aircraft developed from lessons learned from the company’s Fury aircraft. 关键事实：The company describes Thunder as a fully autonomous armed reconnaissance tiltrotor aircraft developed from lessons learned from the company’s Fury aircraft.

entry.title: SEM-Guided Low-kV FIB Finishing for Leading-Edge Semiconductor Failure Analysis
entry.summary: Discover how the ZEISS Crossbeam 750 FIBSEM sets a new benchmark for precise TEM lamella prep, tomography, and advanced nanofabrication. This delivers better resolution, better SN… 关键事实：Discover how the ZEISS Crossbeam 750 FIBSEM sets a new benchmark for precise TEM lamella prep, tomography, and advanced nanofabrication. This delivers better resolution, better SN…

entry.title: AI rocket engine startup LegendSpace raises $29.5 million angel round
entry.summary: HELSINKI — A six-month-old Chinese startup aiming to use artificial intelligence to compress rocket engine development cycles has raised $29.5 million in angel funding. LegendSpac… 关键事实：HELSINKI — A six-month-old Chinese startup aiming to use artificial intelligence to compress rocket engine development cycles has raised $29.5 million in angel funding. LegendSpac…
